Men's Basketball Schedule Roster Coaches Statistics Recruit Form Links

2025-26 Men's Basketball Roster

11 Promise Opurum

  • Position Forward
  • Height 6-7
  • Weight 230
  • Class Redshirt Senior
  • Hometown New Rochelle, N.Y.
  • Bio
  • Related
  • Stats

Biography

2025-26: Appeared in seven games for Pace... Totaled six points and four rebounds across 19 minutes... Shot 75.0 percent from the field... Recorded a season-high two points in multiple contests, including against Queens (NY) (11/16/25), Saint Michael’s (1/17/26), and Southern New Hampshire (2/21/26)... Added a block and a steal while contributing minutes in a reserve role for the Setters throughout the season.

Prior to Pace: Played two seasons at the University of New Hampshire (2022-23 / 2023-24) … Appeared in 18 games for the Wildcats during the 2023-24 campaign, highlighted by a 10-point, 8-rebound performance in the season opener against Curry College … Averaged 3.0 points and 2.2 rebounds per game while shooting 50% from the field … Earned America East Academic Honor Roll recognition following both the Fall 2023 and Spring 2024 semesters.

High School: NY 1st Team ... All State 1st Team ... Lohud Sports Lohud Super 7

Personal: Parents : Clifford and Ngozi Opurum ... Major: Business ... School: Lubin School of Business
